name: Create Emission-Line Difference Image from Eagle Nebula Filters
description: Create a normalized emission-line difference image (H-alpha minus scaled [OIII]) using HST Eagle Nebula narrowband FITS images located at ~/AstroImages/eagle_subtraction/ (656nmos.fits for H-alpha and 502nmos.fits for [OIII]). Determine the normalization scale factor by calculating the ratio of the H-alpha median to the [OIII] median. Scale the [OIII] image by this factor and subtract it from the H-alpha image. Save the resulting difference image to ~/AstroImages/eagle_subtraction/output/halpha_minus_oiii.fits. Generate a text report at ~/AstroImages/eagle_subtraction/output/difference_report.txt including the H-alpha median, [OIII] median, scale factor, difference image statistics (mean, median, min, max, stddev), and the pixel coordinates (x, y) of the peak positive value.

metadata.data_source: NASA/ESA Hubble Space Telescope WFPC2 (Eagle Nebula)
